source_record_details.food_category: Other, mixed, uncategorised or unknown type of food
source_record_details.citation: Food Standards Agency funded data generated at the former FMBRA, Chorleywood (today Champden and Chorleywood Food Research Association), UK

construction_notes: elicited_inputs derived from ComBase record_id 2354 (Other, mixed, uncategorised or unknown type of food / Madeira cake). N0 = log_cfu at lowest step. past/future_temperature_segments are an approximate human-readable split of the curve's duration (constant temperature); ground_truth_curve.values is the actual gridded trajectory. Some grid steps may be linearly interpolated between real lab readings rather than directly measured -- this is expected given sparse irregular sampling gridded onto fixed 15.15h intervals, not a data quality issue. Not a generalization claim -- used to sanity-check the elicit -> infer -> verdict pipeline end to end.
